arts.ttl: Auston Trusty on dream Celtic Champions League scenario coming true
arts.sum: I think to play at the highest stage in club football is a dream come true, but also as a player when you get a chance to back yourself and show that you can compete at this level and no one can really take that away from you, it’s the greatest feeling. And Trusty has revealed these are the types of game he and other players sign up for when the moment comes to decide on whether or not to become a Celt .

arts.ttl: Emerging Celtic transfer headlines as Strelec rules explicitly set, Palma gets airport surprise and Kvistgaarden watch is on
arts.sum: It's all going down as the Premiership champions eye a signing crescendo

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers brands Celtic fan misconduct 'not acceptable' as he sympathises with 'genuine' supporters
arts.sum: “For those Celtic supporters that are genuinely bonded with their club and their team and that traveled near and far over many, many years – to even be at the risk of not going tells you the culmination of events that have taken us to that point. Brendan Rodgers has called out the ‘not acceptable’ Celtic fan behaviour at Villa Park on Tuesday that led to a UEFA disciplinary notice.

arts.ttl: Adam Idah reminds Celtic of club stature as he makes Champions League demand
arts.sum: “I think that’s probably the biggest learning curve we’ve got from Dortmund,” Idah said. “I think the club’s that big that we’re built to play against the top teams and that’s the level we all want to be at, so I don’t think there’s any need to be fearful of anyone.

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted XI vs Motherwell as Jota start up in the air while two stars return
arts.sum: Predicted Celtic XI: SCHMEICHEL, RALSTON, CCV, TRUSTY, TAYLOR, MCGREGOR, ENGELS, BERNARDO, MAEDA, KUHN, IDAH. Jota or Daizen Maeda for Celtic away at Motherwell

arts.ttl: Celtic draw lesser of two Champions League evils as fans all say one thing about Real Madrid
arts.sum: Celtic fans on X are relatively pleased overall with the draw as many preferred drawing Bayern Munich over Real Madrid, the most successful side in European Cup and Champions League history. Celtic supporters have been reacting to the news that the Hoops have been drawn against Bayern Munich in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 'I won the Premier League with Liverpool - Celtic star was best I ever played with'
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk spent two years at Celtic between 2013 and 2015, and the Dutch centre-half has revealed who he believes was the best player he ever shared the pitch with in Glasgow

arts.ttl: 'Celtic star was best I ever played with before I went on to win title with Liverpool'
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk made a name for himself at Celtic before moving to Southampton and Liverpool, and has previously showered one of his ex-Hoops team-mates with praise for his capabilities

arts.ttl: Motherwell manager latest as Stephen Frail opens up on supporter abuse and how his kids are 'mad' on Steelmen
arts.sum: Caretaker boss is preparing players to face Celtic on Sunday just days after Stuart Kettlewell's shock resignation.

arts.ttl: The transfer window champions are crowned as Jury sends Celtic back to the future
arts.sum: The Jury debate the big talking points in Scottish football
